raw_text:
HEADER
Wenzhe(Evelyn)Xu
217-417-9270wxu23@illinois.edu|Address: 100 24 Ave #3,San Mateo,CA 94403
COREQUALIFICATIONS
MACHINE LEARNING & DEEP LEARNING
Modeling: machine learning (regression, classification, clustering), categorical data analysis, time series analysis, sampling, ANOVA analysis, A/B testing, dimension reduction, model selection
ComputerSkill:
Programming: expertise in R (4+yr,dplyr.ggplot2,shiny) , Python(1+yr, Scipy, numpy, pandas, scikit-learn), SQL(3+yr)
Soft ware and system: SAS (Advanced Certified), SPSS, Looker, Linux (CentOS6.5), Mierosoft Office, Map Reduce
Communication andPresentation:
Meeting with business colleagues and transfer the commercial goal into data-driven objective
Quick response to the later-added requirement from business side
Presentation ofthe modeling result and data insight by PPT and building interactive dashboard through Shiny
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
Project Management: Able to track cach stage according to scheduled timeline for an independent project
Researched on anomaly detection algorithm and finally choose the S-H-ES D test from Twitter as basie logic
Collaborative tasks from other projects
Helped to write mapper and reducer function on word coumt for merchant classification based on transection records
Build Hadoop cluster of 12 nodes including tuning critical parameters,and was responsible for the maintenance on memory usage and related package installation under CentOS6.5 Linux environment
5/2014-5/2015
Learned the original algorithm and created advanced string cleaning step for Foursquare/Yelp dat abase
Quantitative exploration experiment projects (Ad Hoc)
Participated in the Cloudera training on Apache Spark
EDUCATION
EDUCATIONBACKGROUND
University ofIllinoisatUrbana-Champaign
8/2013-5/2015
Master of Science in Statistics-Analytics |Major GPA:3.96/4.0
TianjinUniversity of Finance and Economics,Tianjin, China
9/2009-6/2013
Bachelor of Science in Statistics  Overall GPA: 3.75/4.0 |Major GPA :4.0/4.0
Improved the whole workflow by adding lat/lon information as well as inmovative filters to increase mapping accuracy
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
PROFESSIONALEXPERIENCE
Data Scientist Intern,MasterCard Inc.San Car/os, C4
6/2015-12/2015（expected)
Independently designed the automatic anomalies detection system for business metrics time series data
Read package source code of R and re-organized the logic and input to fit the business metnics data application scenario, with integrating special requirement from business and engineer staff's execution
Used Impala/SQL for ETL the data from production, complied the R code into mapper and reducer function in Python with each group id as mapper key, and set up the map-reduce data pipeline job on Oozie
Build PPT for presentation and interactive dashboard from Shiny for collecting feedback of the algorithm to team and quick response to additional need from business and engineer colleagues
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Tech-Sale Analyties Intern,Anheuser-Busch Inbev, Champaign,/L
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Customer profiling with social media data source and internal wholesaler database
+
Overcame the challenges of handling Asian languages and popularized the customer profiling project to global market
Mentored new interns for taking over the customer profiling work flow
Predicted volume for each POC through logistic models and learning algorithms, identified the influencing POCs
Used regression tree to predict the mumber of pipe needed by the target volume for Belgium on-premise market
Transfer the data analysis result to commercial insight and presented to business managers on a regular basis
Overall Highlight: Solid data science background with data engineer skill sets applied in industry Statistical Skill:
Data manipulation: ETL (extract-transform-loading) data techni que with large dataset (Impala 1.x)
markdown:
## HEADER

Wenzhe(Evelyn)Xu
217-417-9270wxu23@illinois.edu|Address: 100 24 Ave #3,San Mateo,CA 94403
COREQUALIFICATIONS

## MACHINE LEARNING & DEEP LEARNING

Modeling: machine learning (regression, classification, clustering), categorical data analysis, time series analysis, sampling, ANOVA analysis, A/B testing, dimension reduction, model selection
ComputerSkill:
Programming: expertise in R (4+yr,dplyr.ggplot2,shiny) , Python(1+yr, Scipy, numpy, pandas, scikit-learn), SQL(3+yr)
Soft ware and system: SAS (Advanced Certified), SPSS, Looker, Linux (CentOS6.5), Mierosoft Office, Map Reduce
Communication andPresentation:
Meeting with business colleagues and transfer the commercial goal into data-driven objective
Quick response to the later-added requirement from business side
Presentation ofthe modeling result and data insight by PPT and building interactive dashboard through Shiny

## ACADEMIC PROJECTS

### Project Management: Able to track cach stage according to scheduled timeline for an independent project
- Researched on anomaly detection algorithm and finally choose the S-H-ES D test from Twitter as basie logic
- Collaborative tasks from other projects
- Helped to write mapper and reducer function on word coumt for merchant classification based on transection records
### Build Hadoop cluster of 12 nodes including tuning critical parameters,and was responsible for the maintenance on memory usage and related package installation under CentOS6.5 Linux environment
**Date:** 5/2014-5/2015
- Learned the original algorithm and created advanced string cleaning step for Foursquare/Yelp dat abase
- Quantitative exploration experiment projects (Ad Hoc)
- Participated in the Cloudera training on Apache Spark

## EDUCATION

EDUCATIONBACKGROUND
### University ofIllinoisatUrbana-Champaign
**Date:** 8/2013-5/2015
### Master of Science in Statistics-Analytics |Major GPA:3.96/4.0
### TianjinUniversity of Finance and Economics,Tianjin, China
**Date:** 9/2009-6/2013
### Bachelor of Science in Statistics Overall GPA: 3.75/4.0 |Major GPA :4.0/4.0
- Improved the whole workflow by adding lat/lon information as well as inmovative filters to increase mapping accuracy

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

PROFESSIONALEXPERIENCE
### Data Scientist Intern,MasterCard Inc.San Car/os, C4
**Date:** 6/2015-12/2015（expected)
- Independently designed the automatic anomalies detection system for business metrics time series data
### Read package source code of R and re-organized the logic and input to fit the business metnics data application scenario, with integrating special requirement from business and engineer staff's execution
### Used Impala/SQL for ETL the data from production, complied the R code into mapper and reducer function in Python with each group id as mapper key, and set up the map-reduce data pipeline job on Oozie
- Build PPT for presentation and interactive dashboard from Shiny for collecting feedback of the algorithm to team and quick response to additional need from business and engineer colleagues

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

Tech-Sale Analyties Intern,Anheuser-Busch Inbev, Champaign,/L

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Customer profiling with social media data source and internal wholesaler database
+
Overcame the challenges of handling Asian languages and popularized the customer profiling project to global market
Mentored new interns for taking over the customer profiling work flow
Predicted volume for each POC through logistic models and learning algorithms, identified the influencing POCs
Used regression tree to predict the mumber of pipe needed by the target volume for Belgium on-premise market
Transfer the data analysis result to commercial insight and presented to business managers on a regular basis
Overall Highlight: Solid data science background with data engineer skill sets applied in industry Statistical Skill:
Data manipulation: ETL (extract-transform-loading) data techni que with large dataset (Impala 1.x)
